heading: Hello,
welcome to my website
bio: I'm Chiara, graphic designer and visual artist with a colorful and symbolic style.

While in private life I am seeking for simplicity, in my work I am used to delve into complexity. As a cross-functional designer, I believe in the blending of different disciplines, putting design at service for other realities.

Born and raised in Venice, my professional background gathers experiences among Corporate Communication at **Metadesign Berlin**, Graphic design for Architecture at **Snøhetta** Oslo & Innsbruck offices, Branding for both commercial and artistic clients, and most recently in the Global Visual Merchandising department at Bata Group.

With a dedicated passion for photography and Cultural Communication, since 2021 I am member of the Italian Association for Visual Communication **AIAP**. When I am not working I am busy with Impersonae workshops that I presented at **Kids Design Week**.
Some of my works have been showcased and rewarded at Milano Graphic Festival, **Arte Laguna Prize**, **Milano Design Week**, **IDA** International Design Awards, **Florence Biennale XV**.

awards.award: IDA International Design Awards, Bronze in Graphic Design
Arte Laguna Prize 14th edition, Arsenale Nord Venice, Digital Graphics section
Milan Design Week, Park Associati Call 2, solo exhibition
IDA International Design Awards, Finalist Covid19 Innovation Design Grant

awards.project: Poster 'I Love You' selected, Spazio Illisso

awards.award: Collective exhibition Independent Artists – Water, Villa Brentano, Milan
Fondazione Bevilacqua La Masa, 100th Young Artists collective, Venice
